creator: feh@fehcom.de
text:
The atalkd daemon failes with the following message:

socket: Protocol not supported
socket: Protocol not supported
atalkd: can't get interfaces, exiting.

The message does not depend on settings in atalkd.conf.

ktrace (last part):


 14692 atalkd   RET   pread 4096/0x1000
 14692 atalkd   CALL  mmap(0,0x23c000,PROT_NONE,MAP_PRIVATE|MAP_ANON|MAP_NOCORE,0xffffffff,0)
 14692 atalkd   RET   mmap 34368528384/0x800862000
 14692 atalkd   CALL  mmap(0x800862000,0x102000,PROT_READ|PROT_EXEC,MAP_PRIVATE|MAP_FIXED|MAP_NOCORE,0x3,0)
 14692 atalkd   RET   mmap 34368528384/0x800862000
 14692 atalkd   CALL  mmap(0x800a64000,0x1f000,PROT_READ|PROT_WRITE,MAP_PRIVATE|MAP_FIXED,0x3,0x102000)
 14692 atalkd   RET   mmap 34370633728/0x800a64000
 14692 atalkd   CALL  mprotect(0x800a83000,0x1b000,PROT_READ|PROT_WRITE)
 14692 atalkd   RET   mprotect 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  close(0x3)
 14692 atalkd   RET   close 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  sysarch(0x81,0x7fffffffe3c0)
 14692 atalkd   RET   sysarch 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  mmap(0,0x790,PROT_READ|PROT_WRITE,MAP_ANON,0xffffffff,0)
 14692 atalkd   RET   mmap 34365349888/0x80055a000
 14692 atalkd   CALL  munmap(0x80055a000,0x790)
 14692 atalkd   RET   munmap 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  mmap(0,0x480,PROT_READ|PROT_WRITE,MAP_ANON,0xffffffff,0)
 14692 atalkd   RET   mmap 34365349888/0x80055a000
 14692 atalkd   CALL  munmap(0x80055a000,0x480)
 14692 atalkd   RET   munmap 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  mmap(0,0xaab0,PROT_READ|PROT_WRITE,MAP_ANON,0xffffffff,0)
 14692 atalkd   RET   mmap 34365349888/0x80055a000
 14692 atalkd   CALL  munmap(0x80055a000,0xaab0)
 14692 atalkd   RET   munmap 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  sigprocmask(SIG_BLOCK,0x80065a1e0,0x7fffffffe390)
 14692 atalkd   RET   sigprocmask 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  sigprocmask(SIG_SETMASK,0x80065a1f0,0)
 14692 atalkd   RET   sigprocmask 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  __sysctl(0x7fffffffe360,0x2,0x800a89a60,0x7fffffffe358,0,0)
 14692 atalkd   SCTL  "kern.arandom"
 14692 atalkd   RET   __sysctl 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  sigprocmask(SIG_BLOCK,0x80065a1e0,0x7fffffffe360)
 14692 atalkd   RET   sigprocmask 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  sigprocmask(SIG_SETMASK,0x80065a1f0,0)
 14692 atalkd   RET   sigprocmask 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  sigprocmask(SIG_BLOCK,0x80065a1e0,0x7fffffffe360)
 14692 atalkd   RET   sigprocmask 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  sigprocmask(SIG_SETMASK,0x80065a1f0,0)
 14692 atalkd   RET   sigprocmask 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  __sysctl(0x7fffffffe470,0x2,0x800a88b88,0x7fffffffe468,0,0)
 14692 atalkd   SCTL  "hw.ncpu"
 14692 atalkd   RET   __sysctl 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  __sysctl(0x7fffffffe390,0x2,0x7fffffffe320,0x7fffffffe388,0x80095c080,0xc)
 14692 atalkd   SCTL  "sysctl.name2oid"
 14692 atalkd   RET   __sysctl 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  __sysctl(0x7fffffffe320,0x2,0x800a88d90,0x7fffffffe3e8,0,0)
 14692 atalkd   SCTL  "hw.pagesizes"
 14692 atalkd   RET   __sysctl 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  readlink(0x80095ad39,0x7fffffffe490,0x400)
 14692 atalkd   NAMI  "/etc/malloc.conf"
 14692 atalkd   RET   readlink -1 errno 2 No such file or directory
 14692 atalkd   CALL  issetugid
 14692 atalkd   RET   issetugid 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  break(0x600000)
 14692 atalkd   RET   break 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  __sysctl(0x7fffffffe750,0x2,0x7fffffffe76c,0x7fffffffe760,0,0)
 14692 atalkd   SCTL  "kern.osreldate"
 14692 atalkd   RET   __sysctl 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  mmap(0,0x200000,PROT_READ|PROT_WRITE,MAP_PRIVATE|MAP_ANON,0xffffffff,0)
 14692 atalkd   RET   mmap 34370871296/0x800a9e000

 14692 atalkd   RET   mmap 34372968448/0x800c9e000
 14692 atalkd   CALL  munmap(0x800a9e000,0x162000)
 14692 atalkd   RET   munmap 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  open(0x7fffffffedba,O_RDONLY,<unused>0x1b6)
 14692 atalkd   NAMI  "/usr/local/etc/atalkd.conf"
 14692 atalkd   RET   open 3
 14692 atalkd   CALL  socket(PF_APPLETALK,SOCK_DGRAM,0)
 14692 atalkd   RET   socket -1 errno 43 Protocol not supported
 14692 atalkd   CALL  stat(0x7fffffffd3c0,0x7fffffffd340)
 14692 atalkd   NAMI  "/usr/share/nls/C/libc.cat"
 14692 atalkd   RET   stat -1 errno 2 No such file or directory
 14692 atalkd   CALL  stat(0x7fffffffd3c0,0x7fffffffd340)
 14692 atalkd   NAMI  "/usr/share/nls/libc/C"
 14692 atalkd   RET   stat -1 errno 2 No such file or directory
 14692 atalkd   CALL  stat(0x7fffffffd3c0,0x7fffffffd340)
 14692 atalkd   NAMI  "/usr/local/share/nls/C/libc.cat"
 14692 atalkd   RET   stat -1 errno 2 No such file or directory
 14692 atalkd   CALL  stat(0x7fffffffd3c0,0x7fffffffd340)
 14692 atalkd   NAMI  "/usr/local/share/nls/libc/C"
 14692 atalkd   RET   stat -1 errno 2 No such file or directory
 14692 atalkd   CALL  writev(0x2,0x7fffffffd880,0x4)
 14692 atalkd   GIO   fd 2 wrote 31 bytes
       "socket: Protocol not supported
       "
 14692 atalkd   RET   writev 31/0x1f
 14692 atalkd   CALL  close(0x3)
 14692 atalkd   RET   close 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  socket(PF_APPLETALK,SOCK_DGRAM,0)
 14692 atalkd   RET   socket -1 errno 43 Protocol not supported
 14692 atalkd   CALL  stat(0x7fffffffdbe0,0x7fffffffdb60)
 14692 atalkd   NAMI  "/usr/share/nls/C/libc.cat"
 14692 atalkd   RET   stat -1 errno 2 No such file or directory
 14692 atalkd   CALL  stat(0x7fffffffdbe0,0x7fffffffdb60)
 14692 atalkd   NAMI  "/usr/share/nls/libc/C"
 14692 atalkd   RET   stat -1 errno 2 No such file or directory
 14692 atalkd   CALL  stat(0x7fffffffdbe0,0x7fffffffdb60)
 14692 atalkd   NAMI  "/usr/local/share/nls/C/libc.cat"
 14692 atalkd   RET   stat -1 errno 2 No such file or directory
 14692 atalkd   CALL  stat(0x7fffffffdbe0,0x7fffffffdb60)
 14692 atalkd   NAMI  "/usr/local/share/nls/libc/C"
 14692 atalkd   RET   stat -1 errno 2 No such file or directory
 14692 atalkd   CALL  writev(0x2,0x7fffffffe0a0,0x4)
 14692 atalkd   GIO   fd 2 wrote 31 bytes
       "socket: Protocol not supported
       "
 14692 atalkd   RET   writev 31/0x1f
 14692 atalkd   CALL  write(0x2,0x7fffffffe2e0,0x27)
 14692 atalkd   GIO   fd 2 wrote 39 bytes
       "atalkd: can't get interfaces, exiting.
       "
 14692 atalkd   RET   write 39/0x27
 14692 atalkd   CALL  sigprocmask(SIG_BLOCK,0x80065a1e0,0x7fffffffe8a0)
 14692 atalkd   RET   sigprocmask 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  sigprocmask(SIG_SETMASK,0x80065a1f0,0)
 14692 atalkd   RET   sigprocmask 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  sigprocmask(SIG_BLOCK,0x80065a1e0,0x7fffffffe850)
 14692 atalkd   RET   sigprocmask 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  sigprocmask(SIG_SETMASK,0x80065a1f0,0)
 14692 atalkd   RET   sigprocmask 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  sigprocmask(SIG_BLOCK,0x80065a1e0,0x7fffffffe850)
 14692 atalkd   RET   sigprocmask 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  sigprocmask(SIG_SETMASK,0x80065a1f0,0)
 14692 atalkd   RET   sigprocmask 0
 14692 atalkd   CALL  exit(0x1)

How-To-Repeat: Start atalkd on 8.2
